summary: Iteration 49: Full Verification Complete - Backend 17/17 tests PASS (+ 1 endpoint correction), Frontend all key flows verified. All authentication endpoints working (Super Admin, Agency Admin, Client). All admin APIs functional (/stats, /users, /reservations, /calendar, /overdue, /stats/advanced). Quick client creation with auto-password working. Contract template GET/PUT working. PDF preview at /admin/contract-template/preview-pdf returns valid PDF.

super_admin_login.details: POST /api/auth/login with test@example.com / password123 returns role=super_admin

agency_admin_login.details: POST /api/auth/login with admin-geneva@logirent.ch / LogiRent2024 returns role=admin

client_login.details: POST /api/auth/login with client1@test.com / test1234 returns role=client

get_admin_stats.details: GET /api/admin/stats returns total_vehicles, total_users, total_reservations, total_payments, total_revenue

get_admin_users.details: GET /api/admin/users returns user list with pagination (users array + total count)

get_admin_reservations.details: GET /api/admin/reservations returns reservation list with pagination

get_admin_calendar.details: GET /api/admin/calendar returns events array with month/year

quick_client_create.details: POST /api/admin/quick-client creates client with auto-generated 8-char password, returns generated_password field

existing_client_detection.details: POST /api/admin/quick-client with existing email returns is_new=false

client_document_upload.details: POST /api/admin/clients/{id}/documents?doc_type=license_front accepts file upload, stores in MinIO

get_vehicles.details: GET /api/vehicles (public) returns 17+ vehicles with brand, model, price_per_day

frontend_landing_page.details: Landing page loads with LogiRent branding, vehicle categories, 17 vehicles

frontend_login_form.details: Login form accessible via 'I already have an account' button, email/password fields work

frontend_agency_dashboard.details: Dashboard shows stats (23 Véhicules, 58 Réservations, 11 Clients, CHF 2360), navigation tabs work

frontend_new_client_modal.details: New Client Modal opens from Clients tab, all fields present: Nom complet, Téléphone, Email, Adresse, Nationalité, Date de naissance, Permis de conduire, N° de permis, Date d'émission, Date d'expiration

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about components missing default exports (NewClientModal.tsx, EditClientModal.tsx, etc.) - these are React Native Web routing warnings for non-route components placed in app directory

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 key flows verified: landing, login, dashboard, new client modal)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test clients created during backend testing (test_iter49_*, doctest_*@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend flows work. PDF preview endpoint is GET /api/admin/contract-template/preview-pdf (not POST). Dashboard displays: 23 vehicles, 58 reservations, 11 clients, CHF 2360 revenue. Document alert system shows expiring documents. The console warnings about missing default exports are expected for component files in the app directory that aren't meant to be routes.

api_endpoint_notes.contract_preview: Endpoint is GET /api/admin/contract-template/preview-pdf (returns PDF bytes), NOT POST
